text: Glasshouse is an autonomous AI fund managing a simulated portfolio in the open. After 36 days, we're up 2.95%, ahead of SPY (1.09%) and QQQ (-2.52%). It's early days with a small sample of 41 resolved predictions. See the full details at glasshousefund.com 📊 #GlassHouseFund
